title: Dylon Colour Detergent (30 Wash Loads), Liquid Laundry Detergent for all Coloured Clothes, Colour Washing Detergent to Revitalise Colours and renewing in every wash with optimal results in 10 washes
features: Revitalises Colours: Dylon Colour Laundry Detergent not only cleans gently, but it also revitalises colours and renews fibres
Renews Fibres: Dylon transforms your faded and worn-out coloured clothes into looking and feeling like new

Triple Renew Technology: With Triple Renew Technology, the clothing detergent provides Colour Renewal, reviving coloured clothes, Fibre Renewal, removing pills and fuzz, and Freshness Renewal, cleaning gently
Care For The Planet: Dylon is made of 95% biodegradable ingredients; the bottle is made of 50% recycled plastic and it is recyclable (without label & sticker)
Easy to Use: Dose the amount of laundry detergent liquid into the lid of the bottle, add the liquid to the drum or laundry drawer and start the laundry cycle
description: Product Description New? No, washed with Dylon Colour Detergent. Discover Dylon Colour Detergent with its innovative Triple Renew Technology - the optimum care for colourful clothes. This laundry detergent provides not only gentle cleanliness for your colourful clothes but also care for your colours and fibres: it removes fuzzing and pilling resulting in a smooth and flawless surface and it makes your colours vibrant - so your clothes feel and look like new. All this is combined with a great fragrance, for fresh and clean results. The clothes detergent can be used in temperatures from 20 to 60C, is suitable for sensitive skin and can even be used as a hand wash detergent. Dylon detergent is safe for use on a variety of fabrics, even delicate fabrics. Dylon Colour Detergent cleans gently + revitalises colours + renews fibres. For all coloured clothes. Choose Dylon, the colour detergent that goes beyond ordinary cleaning, and give your colourful clothes the care they deserve. Care for your clothes and for the planet: The formula consists of 95% biodegradable ingredients. The bottle is recyclable and made of 50% recycled plastic. Related to organic ingredients according to OECD 301/302. Recyclable bottle made of 50% recycled plastic (without label and sticker) Dylon Colour Detergent – for radiant coloured clothes that look and feel like new. Our plant operates with 100% renewable energy. Zero production waste to landfill. Warning: Causes serious eye irritation. May cause an allergic skin reaction. Contains: Methylisothiazolinone. Ingredients 5-15% anionic surfactants, <5% soap, non-ionic surfactants, phosphonates. Further ingredients: Perfumes (Citronellol, Hexyl cinnamal), preservation agents (Benzisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone), Enzymes. Manufacturer Contact Information UK: Henkel Ltd., Wood Lane End, Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, HP2 4RQ, United Kingdom. IRL: Henkel Ireland Distribution Ltd., Tallaght Business Park, Whitestown, Dublin 24, D24 YH42, Ireland. See more
